name: markz-blog
description: MarkZ personal blog and public notes publishing system
author: MarkZ

scripts.build: npm run design:generate && node scripts/sync-notes.mjs && npm run build:blog && npm run build:notes-fallback && npm run build:notes
scripts.quality:check: npm run build && npm run quality:build && npm run quality:web
scripts.build:blog: QUARTZ_INCLUDE_GITIGNORED=1 QUARTZ_SITE=blog npx quartz build -d content/site -o public && node scripts/build-site-extras.mjs --site blog --output public
scripts.build:notes-fallback: QUARTZ_INCLUDE_GITIGNORED=1 QUARTZ_SITE=notes-fallback npx quartz build -d content/notes -o public/notes
scripts.build:notes: QUARTZ_INCLUDE_GITIGNORED=1 QUARTZ_SITE=notes npx quartz build -d content/notes -o public-notes && node scripts/build-site-extras.mjs --site notes --output public-notes
scripts.preview: node scripts/sync-notes.mjs && QUARTZ_INCLUDE_GITIGNORED=1 QUARTZ_SITE=blog npx quartz build --serve -d content/site
scripts.preview:notes: node scripts/sync-notes.mjs && QUARTZ_INCLUDE_GITIGNORED=1 QUARTZ_SITE=notes npx quartz build --serve -d content/notes --port 8081 --wsPort 3002
scripts.deploy: npm run verify && npm run quality:web && node scripts/deploy.mjs
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && npm run design:check && npm run ai:check && npm run evolve:check && npx prettier . --check
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run quality:build && npm run evals:check && npm run security:check
